category_sources: source_facts.description says it generates typed CustomResources from Kubernetes CRDs; official Pulumi README says crd2pulumi generates typed CustomResources based on Kubernetes CustomResourceDefinitions: https://github.com/pulumi/crd2pulumi#readme
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is crd2pulumi; official repository and README heading use crd2pulumi: https://github.com/pulumi/crd2pulumi
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface with goals, install, and usage: https://github.com/pulumi/crd2pulumi#readme
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/pulumi/crd2pulumi, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify Kubernetes CRDs, Pulumi, and generated typed resources: https://github.com/pulumi/crd2pulumi#readme
